name: Energetic Dance
outcome: [AttackerName] speeds up the tempo of [AttackerHisOrHer] movement, swaying and stepping faster as [AttackerHeOrShe] keeps [TargetName]'s eyes engaged with [AttackerHisOrHer] seductive, bouncing display.
miss: [AttackerName] speeds up the tempo of [AttackerHisOrHer] movement, swaying and stepping faster, but [TargetName] manages to ignore [AttackerHisOrHer] seductive, bouncing display.
statusOutcome: [AttackerName] seems to be filled with boundless energy as she moves, increasing [AttackerHisOrHer] technique!
